name: PyPI (pypi.org)
vendor: Python Software Foundation (PSF) / Python Packaging Authority (PyPA)
license: Apache-2.0 (the underlying Warehouse software); the pypi.org service itself is free to use
cost: Free to publish and install. Organizations are free for qualifying community/open-source orgs; Company organizations cost $5 per member user per month (invoiced monthly).
language: Python (Warehouse; with HTML/JS/SCSS frontend), backed by PostgreSQL
first_released: 2003 (original PyPI/"Cheese Shop"; current Warehouse codebase became the default at pypi.org in April 2018)
last_updated: 2026-06 (Warehouse is continuously deployed; repo actively committed as of mid-2026)
perf_notes: Serves on the order of tens of billions of downloads per month and hundreds of petabytes of bandwidth via Fastly's donated CDN, which absorbs >96% of requests before they reach origin. Files served from files.pythonhosted.org backed by object storage (Backblaze B2 cache + AWS S3 archive). Fastly CDN value cited at ~$1.8M/month, donated.
scale_notes: Public, highly-available production service operated by PSF infrastructure. Stateless Warehouse app servers behind Fastly CDN + load balancing (horizontally scaled), PostgreSQL primary/replicas for metadata, multi-backend object storage for files (B2 + S3), OpenSearch for site search. Hosts hundreds of thousands of projects and tens of millions of release files.
summary: The official canonical public Python package index — the default upstream for pip/uv/Poetry/etc. — operated by the PSF on the open-source Warehouse codebase.
extras: OIDC Trusted Publishing for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Google Cloud, and ActiveState
PEP 740 attestations / provenance served via the Integrity API (GET /integrity/<project>/<version>/<filename>/provenance), signed via Sigstore
Mandatory 2FA for all maintainers (TOTP + WebAuthn/passkeys) with recovery codes
Project Quarantine: admins flag suspected-malware projects to block installation (~2000+ malware reports processed in 2025, 66% within 4h)
Organizations and Teams (free for community/OSS, $5/user/mo for companies) with per-project role grants
API tokens are macaroons; account-wide and project-scoped tokens supported
Per-account/project Security history (audit events) and org activity logs
RSS feeds for newest packages, latest updates, and per-project releases
BigQuery public dataset (bigquery-public-data.pypi.file_downloads) and pypistats.org for download analytics
Project pages render README/long_description via readme_renderer (Markdown/reST)
PEP 708 'repository tracks' metadata to help mitigate cross-index dependency confusion
Legacy upload endpoint at upload.pypi.org/legacy/ (twine target)
GPG/PGP signature uploads and serving were removed in May 2023; signing now via Sigstore attestations
New .egg uploads rejected since 2023, though legacy .egg files remain downloadable
XML-RPC search() method disabled since 2020 due to abuse; XML-RPC APIs planned for deprecation, consumers steered to JSON/RSS/Index APIs; no programmatic search API (web UI search only)
Index/Simple API reports api-version 1.4 (PEP 629), serving PEP 503 HTML and PEP 691 JSON with PEP 700 versions/size/upload-time and PEP 658/714 core-metadata fields
